query: hey i want to build a cool landing page for my new mobile game. I have a few design screenshots in downloads (screenshot_1.png and screenshot_2.png) showing the main character and start menu. Can you make a detailed frontend prompt so I can build it in Lovable?

Can you give me a solid build guide/prompt to create a modern portfolio page? I want something clean, minimal, using React and Framer Motion for scroll animations, particularly an editorial feel for displaying my photography projects.
need a next.js tailwind dashboard prompt. it should be a fintech application for showing real-time stock charts. make it dark mode, sleek, high-end, and let me know how to build it step by step
i have this UI mockup from my designer (aura-beauty-v2.jpg) for a beauty salon. can you generate a detailed web layout spec for this so i can copy-paste it into cursor?
i want to build a simple svelte page for my recipe tracker. can you write a detailed specification of the visual components, transitions, and layout structure so the coder knows exactly what to do?
can you build a frontend blueprint for an admin dashboard? here are the mockups: dashboard_main.png and user_settings.png. make sure to define the colors and spacing carefully
Write a highly detailed component-by-component build guide for a SaaS pricing page. I want a bento grid style, playful animations, orange CTAs, and a soft light theme.
i have a video clip (app_navigation_flow.mov) showing how the transition between pages should look in our mobile view. can you generate a motion-focused layout prompt from it?
i want to make a cinematic portfolio for a film director. need a full build prompt with animations, colors, fonts, and responsive grid layouts
please design a layout blueprint for a product page from this sketch: product_wireframe.png. include details for spacing, glassmorphic cards, and hover states.
can you write a python script to parse logs from our web server? the log file is in logs/nginx_access.log and i want to extract count of 404 errors
how do i configure a PostgreSQL database to handle fast reads for a multi-tenant SaaS application? should i use indexes on tenant_id?
write a backend express api route to handle user registration. it should hash passwords with bcrypt and save to MongoDB
can you analyze this PDF report (Q4_financials.pdf) and extract the table on page 4 showing revenue by region? write the results as a CSV
My svelte page is showing a blank screen on load. Can you help me debug this error in my console: Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map')?
how do i add unit tests for my React components using Vitest and React Testing Library? write a sample test for a simple button click
can you deploy this folder to vercel? it has an index.html and styles.css. use the vercel CLI or vercel MCP if you have it
write a typescript function to sort an array of objects by a date field in descending order
analyze the security vulnerabilities in this package.json file. are there any outdated dependencies with high CVEs?
can you help me write an article about the history of web design from the 90s to today? focus on table-based layouts vs grid layouts
